description_long: This bungalow features a low-pitched, multi-faceted hip roof with gray shingles and a wide overhang, providing ample shade to the front porch area. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by two columns, a large glass sliding door, and a single-car driveway with a paved surface. The exterior walls are clad in light beige siding with a stone base trim, and the windows are large and rectangular, offering plenty of natural light. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a single back door. The property is bordered by a small patch of green lawn and a set of modern, black-and-white fence panels at the front. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A compact, single-story bungalow with a hip roof, covered front porch, large windows, and a mix of beige siding and stone trim, set on a small green lawn with a modern fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, two supporting columns, large glass sliding door, driveway, and modern fence panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long hip roof, two large rectangular windows, and the stone base trim along the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single back door, minimal windows, and a continuous stone base trim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single window, the driveway, and the extended roof overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
